nodes.itemHTML: • Unicornstars2.8k - Various awesome ESLint rules.
• ecmascript-compatstars37 - Disable ECMAScript language features not supported by your browserslist targets.
• esstars90 - Disable specific ECMAScript language versions or individual features.
• es5stars53 - ESLint plugin for ES5 users (forbid ES2015+ usage).
• ie11stars14 - Detect unsupported ES6 features in IE11.
• deprecatestars65 - Mark functions or modules as deprecated and get lint messages when they are used.
• deprecationstars127 - Identifies use of jsdoc @deprecated functions.
• disablestars52 - Disable specified plugins using file path patterns and inline comments.
• HTMLstars375 - Linting for JavaScript inside of HTML <script> tags.
• Markdownstars291 - Linting for JavaScript inside of Markdown.
• Coffeestars11 - Enables linting CoffeeScript files with, with optional linting rules from the Coffeelint library.

    • Flowstars1.1k - Flow type linting rules.
    • Flow Errorsstars409 - Run Flow as an ESLint plugin.

• JSON
    • JSONstars162 - Lint your JSON files.
    • JSON, package.jsonstars34 - Lint, format, and auto-fix your JSON files. Sort your package.json.
    • JSON with Commentsstars60 - ESLint plugin for JSON, JSONC and JSON5.
    • JSON Schemastars33 - Validates data defined in JavaScript, JSON, YAML and TOML using JSON Schema Validator.
• Nodestars893 - Additional ESLint's rules for Node.js.
• SQLstars66 - SQL linting rules for ESLint.
• TypeScript - Linting rules for TypeScript.
• PutOut - an ESLint plugin integrates putoutstars390 linter into ESLint.
• DOMstars9

    • Enforcing practicesstars971 - Linting rules for Jest.

• Computational Biology in Sweden, RSG-Sweden - A team of students and researchers working together to get more people interested in computational biology, and connect people to build a diverse and inclusive community across Sweden.

• Black Women in Computational Biology - An intersectional community of Black women who are working toward (or interested in) a career that combines computational and quantitative sciences with biology.
